word: G1575 - ἐκκλάω - ekkláō - ek-klah'-o - Break off

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐκκλάω

- Transliteration: Ekklao

- Phonetic: ek-klah'-o

- Definition:

1. to break off, to cut off

- Origin: from G1537 and G2806

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and G2806; to exscind: - break off.
